slides.title: Broad shoulders are the *ultimate looksmax*.
slides.sub: Unlike your bone width, the look of broad shoulders is trainable. It's posture, muscle and contrast.

slides.title: Side delts widen you
slides.body: *Lateral raises* widen the shoulder line far more than pressing. Slow but real — train them often.

slides.title: Posture collapses width
slides.body: Rounded shoulders fold your frame inward. *Pull them back and down* and you instantly read wider.

slides.title: A smaller waist helps
slides.body: Shoulders read wider against a *leaner waist* — the V-taper illusion does half the work.

slides.title: Fill out the shirt
slides.body: Rows and pull-ups *thicken the upper back* so your shoulders fill a shirt from every angle.

slides.title: Width takes months
slides.body: Real shoulder width is *months of consistency*, not weeks. Size the timeline honestly and keep going.

slides.title: Wider shoulders, *built honestly*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the sleep, food, water and steps that fuel the training behind your frame — in one score.

caption:
Broad shoulders are the looksmax everyone wants — and the look is trainable, not just genetics. 💪

Side-delt raises, better posture, a leaner waist, a thicker back. Width takes months, so be patient. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks the sleep, food, water and steps that fuel the work → link in bio.
youtube_title: Broad Shoulders Are the Ultimate Looksmax — And They're Trainable

bg_prompts.cover: Black-and-white cinematic editorial beauty portrait. Dramatic low-key Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, dark charcoal background. Glowing dewy skin with fine realistic texture, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look. Single subject, calm confident mood. No text, no logos, no props. Vertical composition with the subject toward the upper half so the lower third falls into darkness. A man with broad, well-developed shoulders and a clear V-taper, posture tall and open, light defining the width of his frame.
